message:
feat(polyfills): Round 9 - crypto cipher, Buffer methods, StringDecoder

Crypto:
- Add AES-256-CBC and AES-128-CBC encryption/decryption in native Zig
- Implement createCipheriv/createDecipheriv with streaming interface
- PKCS7 padding for block cipher modes

Buffer native methods:
- fill(value, offset, end) with number/string/Buffer support
- swap16/swap32/swap64 byte order swapping
- 28 read/write methods: Int8/16/32, UInt8/16/32, Float, Double (LE/BE)

StringDecoder:
- New native module for handling multi-byte UTF-8 boundaries
- Properly buffers incomplete sequences across write() calls
- Guard in zlib.js to not overwrite native implementation

All 27 Round 9 tests pass.
